name: Perth (Western Australia, Australia)

colors.symbolism: the black swans of the city arms

description: A white field bearing the red Cross of St George, with the coat of arms of the City of Perth (black swans supporting a shield beneath a mural crown) superimposed at the centre.
history: The flag is the red Cross of St George on white with the City of Perth's coat of arms at the centre. The arms were granted in 1926 and altered in 1949 to add elements of the arms of Perth, Scotland, after which the city was named.

features.role: Coat of arms of the City of Perth (black swans, mural crown)
